findings.observed_symptom: The ABI verification only compared the csv_* subset of dynamic exports, so unexpected GLOBAL DEFAULT exports or symbol drift outside that prefix could evade the test suite.
findings.expected_behavior: The complete defined GLOBAL DEFAULT export set must exactly match original/debian/libcsv3.symbols.

findings.observed_symptom: The wave1 matrix exercised readstat semicolon parsing plus csvcheck and csvvalid strict-quote failures only through probe scripts, leaving those client-visible semantics unpinned at the library test layer.
findings.expected_behavior: Committed regressions should reproduce those downstream fixture behaviors directly through the library APIs so wave1 compatibility can be checked without relying only on the full matrix.

findings.observed_symptom: The downstream inventory and validator still encoded the wave1 verifier ids and bounce target, so the matrix could pass while advertising the wrong wave for `impl_wave2_integration_fixes`.
findings.expected_behavior: The verifier topology must require `check_wave2_software_tester` and `check_wave2_senior_tester`, both with `bounce_target` set to `impl_wave2_integration_fixes`.
